# Salazar & Associates, CPAs

> Salazar & Associates, CPAs is a Certified Public Accountant firm located in South Austin, Texas, offering tax preparation, tax planning, and consulting services for individuals and businesses.

## Contact

- Address: 506 Heartwood Drive, Austin, TX 78745
- Office phone: 512.440.7184
- Cell phone: 737.231.5323
- Fax: 512.440.7283
- Email: salazarcpas@gmail.com

## Office hours

- Monday through Thursday: 9 AM to 5 PM
- Friday: 9 AM to 4 PM

## Pages

- [Home](https://salazarcpas.com/): Overview, office hours, contact information, and tax preparation services.
- [Location](https://salazarcpas.com/location/): Office address, photos of the office exterior, and an embedded map.
- [IRS Resources](https://salazarcpas.com/irs-resources/): Filing deadlines for the current tax year and links to official IRS forms and information.
- [Staff](https://salazarcpas.com/staff/): Team members, including CPAs, AFSPs, bookkeeper, and receptionist.
- [Contact](https://salazarcpas.com/contact/): Phone, email, fax, and cell contact details, plus office location and map.

## Services

- Tax preparation (individuals and businesses)
- Tax planning and consulting
- Bookkeeping

## Staff

- Jose Salazar, CPA
- Frances Ortiz-Salazar, CPA
- Diana E. Hernandez, AFSP

- Jessica Salazar, Bookkeeper
- Micaela Martinez, Receptionist
